svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Codex" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="composition" name="02 Power Composition"> <mxGraphModel dx="1356" dy="880" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="720" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="p2-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F7F9FC;strokeColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="720" width="1200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-title-card" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#E2E7F0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="94" width="1084" x="58" y="46" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=32;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#172033;" value="SoC 功耗构成：动态功耗 + 静态功耗" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="840" x="90" y="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-sub" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=18;fontColor=#4D596B;" value="动态功耗看翻转，静态功耗看漏电；优化方向不同。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="840" x="90" y="108" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-total" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D9DEEA;fontSize=28;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#23304A;" value="Total Power" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="360" x="420" y="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-split-v" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#8A95A8;strokeWidth=3;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="600" y="268" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="600" y="318" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-split-h" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#8A95A8;strokeWidth=3;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="300" y="318" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="900" y="318" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-left-drop" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#8A95A8;strokeWidth=3;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="300" y="318" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="300" y="362" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-right-drop" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#8A95A8;strokeWidth=3;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="900" y="318" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="900" y="362" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-dyn-tip" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#EAF5FF;strokeColor=#3387D6;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#253047;" value="降压、降频、降翻转" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="258" x="96" y="286" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-static-tip" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#FFF3E5;strokeColor=#F28C38;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#253047;" value="高 Vt、关电、偏置" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="258" x="846" y="286" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-dyn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#EFEAFF;strokeColor=#6F52ED;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#23304A;align=left;spacingLeft=32;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=26;" value="动态功耗 Dynamic Power<br><br>Pdyn ≈ Ceff · Vdd² · f&nbsp;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="270" width="430" x="88" y="362" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-dyn-b1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=6;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D9DEEA;fontSize=17;fontColor=#5C6678;" value="节点电容充放电" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="156" x="126" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-dyn-b2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=6;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D9DEEA;fontSize=17;fontColor=#5C6678;" value="时钟网络翻转" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="156" x="304" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-dyn-b3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=6;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D9DEEA;fontSize=17;fontColor=#5C6678;" value="数据活动率" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="156" x="126" y="566" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-dyn-b4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=6;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D9DEEA;fontSize=17;fontColor=#5C6678;" value="短路电流" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="156" x="304" y="566" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-static" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#E8FBF0;strokeColor=#24A15D;strokeWidth=3;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#23304A;align=left;spacingLeft=32;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=26;" value="静态功耗 Static Power<br><br>Pleak ≈ (Isub + Igate + Ijunc) · Vdd" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="270" width="430" x="682" y="362" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-static-b1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=6;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D9DEEA;fontSize=17;fontColor=#5C6678;" value="亚阈值漏电" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="156" x="720" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-static-b2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=6;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D9DEEA;fontSize=17;fontColor=#5C6678;" value="栅漏电" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="156" x="898" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-static-b3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=6;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D9DEEA;fontSize=17;fontColor=#5C6678;" value="结漏电" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="156" x="720" y="566" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2-static-b4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=6;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#D9DEEA;fontSize=17;fontColor=#5C6678;" value="待机泄漏" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="156" x="898" y="566" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(226, 231, 240), rgb(34, 39, 46));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 838px; height: 1px; padding-top: 85px; margin-left: 92px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #172033;
display: inline-block; font-size: 32px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#172033, #ccd3e4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: SoC 功耗构成：动态功耗 + 静态功耗
